satisfiability_decision_rule: COMPLETED and POSITIVE only if at least one retained valuation satisfies the complete frozen theory {A}; otherwise NEGATIVE. Mark INVALID if any declared valuation is missing or duplicated.
entailment_decision_rule: PROP-9902-A is entailed only if no theory-satisfying valuation makes A false.
non_entailment_decision_rule: PROP-9902-B is not entailed only if a retained theory-satisfying valuation makes B false; that valuation is the required countermodel.
